title: Normalize Sentiment Label Variants
description: Different model versions return inconsistent sentiment labels - normalize them to a fixed set.
problem: Write normalize_sentiment(label) that maps any of 'POS','Positive','positive','pos' to 'positive'; any of 'NEG','Negative','negative','neg' to 'negative'; anything else to 'neutral'.
hint: Lowercase the label first, then check if it starts with 'pos' or 'neg', else return 'neutral'.
